page_content:
Recommended: GEOL650.

Credit Only Granted for. GEOL683 or GEOL789K.

Formerly: GEOL789K.

GEOL688 Geology Colloquium (1 Credit)

Contemporary research topics and issues in geosciences are explored through the weekly Geology departmental colloquium and discussion of its contents.

Restriction: Restricted to graduate students in Geology who have not yet advanced to PhD candidacy. Repeatable for credit with changing content. May not be taken for credit concurrently with GEOL497 or GEOL497H. Repeatable to: 4 credits.
